title: CCS Capture Cost by CO2 Concentration
description: Cost of CO2 capture (USD per tonne) across seven point and air sources, ordered by CO2 concentration in the source stream. Concentrated streams (ethanol fermentation, ammonia) capture cheaply; dilute streams (NGCC flue gas, direct air) cost an order of magnitude more. Values aggregated from DOE/NETL Industrial CCS Cost Study (2022) and EFI Foundation Direct Air Capture Case Study (2024), as compiled by Avanza Energy.

source.name: Avanza Energy Substack (compiled from DOE/NETL 2022 and EFI Foundation 2024)

cost_usd_per_tonne.name: cost_usd_per_tonne
cost_usd_per_tonne.description: Capture cost in USD per tonne of CO2

co2_concentration_pct.name: co2_concentration_pct
co2_concentration_pct.description: Volumetric CO2 concentration in the source stream, in percent
